source: clean task-tagged ledgers, 5 C0 reps + 5 HYBRID1 reps, same 10 interesting tasks
status: VERIFIED REAL — this is the one genuine, reproducible win
caveat: per-call prompt reduction is REAL and large (~40%). It does NOT propagate to task-level cost saving because (1) cache-busting converts cheap cache_read to expensive cache_creation, (2) the agent sometimes takes more steps. Original +41.5% was real-but-on-contaminated-ledger; clean recompute confirms ~43% mean.
